description_long: This office building complex features two main towers of differing heights, both with a modern rectangular form and a grid of evenly spaced windows. The taller tower rises prominently behind a shorter, wider structure, both clad in a light facade with blue-tinted window panels. The base of the complex is expansive, with a stepped platform and a large, flat-roofed podium that connects the two towers. The windows are arranged in a highly regular, orthogonal pattern, emphasizing the building's modernist aesthetic. The ground level appears to have a colonnade or series of recessed panels, suggesting possible retail or lobby spaces. The overall design is clean, geometric, and functional, typical of late 20th-century commercial architecture.
description: A modern office building complex with two rectangular towers, blue-tinted windows, and a large stepped podium base. The facade is light-colored with a regular grid of windows and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the taller tower behind the shorter, wider building, both with a grid of blue-tinted windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the complex and the stepped podium connecting the two towers.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the alignment of the towers and the expansive flat base with geometric patterns.
description_view_3: Alternate side view showing the shorter building in front and the taller tower rising behind, with visible podium details.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform grid of rectangular windows, evenly spaced in horizontal and vertical rows across all facades.
